TwoWiki Fossil Skin v7 — wider 1280px content container,
unified report card (status key + search + table flush-stacked),
admin / edit-mode action bars with per-row edit links,
plus all v6 features (single-line dark header, slim breadcrumb,
all-caps muted-color status pills, accentuated search,
status-striped ticket rows, tag variants).

Install:
  fossil config import twowiki-fossil-skin-v7.zip

Or upload header.txt / footer.txt / css.txt via Admin → Skins.
